Welcome to SahiDawa.

@`{author}`, please review the following setup instructions before contributing:

1. Setup Instructions

- Frontend (`apps/web`): Run `npm install` and `npm run dev` to start Next.js on `localhost:3000`.
- Backend (`apps/api`): Run `npm install` and `npm run dev` to start Node.js on `localhost:4000`.
- ML Service (`apps/ml`): Read our [ML Setup Guide](https://github.com/RatLoopz/sahidawa-india/blob/main/docs/getting-started/ml-setup.md) to activate the Python environment.

For full details, review our [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/RatLoopz/sahidawa-india/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

2. Branch Naming Convention

- `feat/your-feature-name` (New features)
- `fix/bug-description` (Bug fixes)
- `docs/doc-updates` (Documentation)
- `test/test-description` (Test suites)

3. Pull Request Requirements

- Link the PR to an assigned issue using `Closes #123`.
- Test all changes locally before opening a PR.
- Ensure lints and format checks pass. Do not commit `.env` or `node_modules`.

If you have questions, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/dvbDuJVwNa) or use GitHub Discussions.
